outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Pentagon says 90% of Iran's navy sunk as ceasefire extension talks gain momentum
outlets.summary: CNN covers Pentagon briefing revealing 150 Iranian ships sunk, 13K targets struck. Also reports ceasefire extension 'in-principle agreement.' S&P 500 hits record 7,022. Lebanon death toll rises to 2,167.

outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: Iran threatens Red Sea blockade as US deploys 10,000 more troops to Middle East
outlets.summary: NBC covers Iran's threat to block Red Sea shipping alongside news of 10,000+ additional US troops deploying. Reports Hegseth impeachment filed. Ceasefire extension discussed.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: US military stops 9 oil tankers attempting to break Iranian blockade — Iran 'combat ineffective for years'
outlets.summary: Fox News leads with blockade enforcement success — 9 tankers turned back. Highlights Pentagon briefing: 150 ships sunk, 13K targets. Frames war as decisive US victory. Notes S&P 500 record.

outlets.name: Fox Business
outlets.headline: Trump says Iran war 'very close to being over' — peace talks expected to resume
outlets.summary: Fox Business covers Trump's optimistic tone on war ending, potential Round 2 talks in Pakistan. Notes ceasefire extension discussions and Pentagon's military statistics.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: US sending 10,000 more troops to Middle East despite Iran ceasefire — blockade 9 tankers
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera leads with US troop deployment contradicting ceasefire rhetoric. Also covers 3 paramedics killed in triple-tap strike, Lebanon death toll 2,167, and UAE-Iran first call since February.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: US and Iran weigh extending their ceasefire by two weeks
outlets.summary: Bloomberg exclusive reports in-principle ceasefire extension agreement. Three sticking points: nuclear program, Hormuz, $270B compensation. UAE-Iran de-escalation call noted as diplomatic progress.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: One hurt as Hezbollah fires over 40 rockets at northern Israel; IDF strikes 200+ targets in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Times of Israel covers continued Hezbollah rocket fire (40+ evening barrage), 1 injured in Tamra. IDF struck 200+ targets. 3 paramedics killed in triple-tap. Netanyahu: 'prepared for any scenario.'

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF troops uncover anti-tank missile launcher aimed at northern Israel
outlets.summary: JPost covers IDF ground operations in Lebanon — weapons cache with anti-tank missiles, grenades, and ammunition found. Pentagon briefing stats on Iran's destroyed military. Netanyahu video statement.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: 'Iran not blockadable': Tehran says all 'means of pressure' will fail
outlets.summary: PressTV leads with FM spokesman Baghaei declaring Iran 'not blockadable.' Covers Araghchi-Munir meeting in Tehran. Iran rejects UAE-IMO maritime corridor. Frames US blockade as 'illegal.'

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran's top general warns US over 'illegal naval blockage' — threatens Red Sea, Gulf shutdown
outlets.summary: PressTV leads with Abdollahi's threat to block all shipping in Persian Gulf, Sea of Oman, and Red Sea. Frames US blockade as illegal and a ceasefire violation. Pakistan army chief Munir arrives in Tehran for mediation.
